articles.title: NO AI WITHOUT APIS
articles.summary: To build for the new AI era, APIs and developer platforms need to evolve. Join the API Summit by Kong (free, virtual) [4] to explore the intersection of AI and APIs, alongside technical leaders from Kong, Goldman Sachs, Uber, AWS, and others.
3️⃣ Save your virtual spot [6] at API Summit by Kong (FREE)

articles.title: HUGGING FACE ACQUIRES XETHUB
articles.summary: Hugging Face serves and stores a lot of data, most of it in LFS. XetHub has written its own, powerful, alternative for scaling Git repositories.

articles.title: HUMANE'S DAILY RETURNS ARE OUTPACING SALES
articles.summary: Humane's AI Pin faced a significant return rate post-launch with negative reviews, leading to approximately 7,000 of the sold units remaining with customers. Despite raising over $200 million from tech luminaries, Humane struggled with over $1 million in returns and internal leadership turnover. Amidst financial woes, there's speculation about a potential HP acquisition and new debt fundraising efforts.

articles.title: GPT-4O SYSTEM CARD
articles.summary: Aligning a voice system is challenging. This post highlights the ongoing efforts to ensure the multimodal model is safe and helpful.

articles.title: QWEN2-MATH
articles.summary: The Qwen team has released a 72B math model that outperforms all open and closed models on MATH. It also outperforms Llama-3.1-405B on a number of reasoning benchmarks. It is limited to English only, with multilingual models coming soon.

articles.title: SEMANTIC SEGMENTATION IN PATHOLOGY
articles.summary: SAM2-PATH is a new framework designed to enhance semantic segmentation in digital pathology.

articles.title: A MULTILINGUAL DATASET FOR SPOKEN LANGUAGE UNDERSTANDING
articles.summary: Speech-MASSIVE is a new multilingual Spoken Language Understanding (SLU) dataset. It offers a speech-based counterpart to the MASSIVE textual corpus.

articles.title: 🏋️OPTIMIZE LLAMA3.1-8B TO OUTPERFORM GPT-4O
articles.summary: Learn to harness small open source models to overpower the big closed source providers, all while controlling your own data.

articles.title: PYTORCH FLEXATTENTION
articles.summary: PyTorch has released a new API that allows any type of attention variant to be coded and compiled to Triton. This allows for better portability, performance, and research velocity on types of attention.

articles.title: A LANGUAGE MODEL WITH QUICK PRE-TRAINING
articles.summary: The "1.5-Pints" Language Model presents a new approach to compute-efficient pre-training. By curating a high-quality dataset of 57 billion tokens, this model surpasses Apple's OpenELM and Microsoft's Phi in instruction-following tasks, as measured by MT-Bench.

articles.title: VIDEO MOMENT RETRIEVAL AND HIGHLIGHT DETECTION
articles.summary: Lighthouse is a user-friendly library designed to tackle the challenges in video moment retrieval and highlight detection.

articles.title: WHY AI HASN'T SHOWN UP IN THE GDP STATISTICS YET
AI IS COMING FOR INDIA'S FAMOUS TECH HUB
articles.summary: India's technology outsourcing industry is facing a pivot as AI integration threatens jobs, especially in basic tasks like call centers. Companies are challenged to ascend the value chain amidst a hiring slowdown, with some hopeful AI tools will create new opportunities in sectors like programming. The industry's future demands higher-level cognitive skills as automation continues to redefine traditional roles.

articles.title: INSIDE THE COMPANY THAT GATHERS ‘HUMAN DATA' FOR EVERY MAJOR AI COMPANY
articles.summary: Breakthroughs in AI pre-training have enabled models to process massive online datasets, while subsequent supervised fine-tuning with experts helps models generalize and gain specialized knowledge. Turing's approach of using "input and output pairs" generated by subject-matter experts aims to advance AI reasoning capabilities. Anticipating an "agentic" era of AI, these models could autonomously perform complex tasks by integrating specialized knowledge across domains.

articles.title: FULLY-AUTOMATIC ROBOT DENTIST PERFORMS WORLD'S FIRST HUMAN PROCEDURE
articles.summary: Perceptive has developed an AI-controlled autonomous dental robot that performed a complete dental procedure notably faster than traditional methods.

articles.title: MICROSOFT LAUNCHES GITHUB MODELS, OFFERING 100 MILLION DEVELOPERS EASY ACCESS TO LEADING AI TOOLS
articles.summary: Microsoft's new "GitHub Models" offers developers access to AI models like Llama 3.1 and GPT-4 and enables AI integration within software projects.

articles.title: GOOGLE BRINGS GEMINI-POWERED SEARCH HISTORY AND LENS TO CHROME DESKTOP
articles.summary: Google is deploying new Gemini-powered features to Chrome Desktop, including Google Lens integration for visual searches, Tab Compare for streamlined shopping comparisons, and natural language processing for enhanced browsing history search.
